title: LiveUpdate
description: The SSE 'briefing-update' envelope pushed to open cockpit briefings (FR-010/FR-011). Carries a consolidated alert plus the FULL re-synthesized scene DTO (reaction granularity, research R7). Validated with JsonSchema.Net draft-2020-12 (Decision #6).

sequence.description: Monotonic sequence; mirrored to the SSE 'id:' line for Last-Event-ID reconnect (research R4).

briefing.description: The full re-synthesized scene DTO — RmBriefing for rm-briefing, MorningBrief for morning-brief. Shape is identical in DEMO and LIVE (Principle III). Validated against the existing scene contracts; event linkage fields are additive (data-model.md §3).

priority.description: Maps from event severity (low->info, medium->notice, high->urgent).

headline.description: Consolidated banner text; for a coalesced burst it names all new events (research R3).

eventIds.description: The event(s) that triggered this update; a coalesced burst lists all.

noImpact.description: true => 'new event, no portfolio impact'; rankings unchanged (US2 AS3).
